headline: Consumer Discretionary - Toys and Electronics Q4 Earnings: Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) Simply the Best
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the consumer discretionary - toys and electronics industry, including Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) and its peers.

headline: Hastings locks in African feedstock supply, puts Thailand rare earths plant on track for year-end cash flow
summary: Hastings Technology Metals Ltd (ASX:HAS, OTC:HSRMF) has moved quickly to secure the raw material supply needed to bring its newly acquired hydrometallurgical plant in Thailand into production, signing a Framework Offtake Agreement with strategic partner Enuo Holdings for African-sourced monazite...
